response: The primary objective of this report is to estimate federal import tax expenditures in Ethiopia for the fiscal years 2018/19, 2019/20 and 2020/21 [Source 5, page 6]. It uses shipment-level microdata from the Ethiopian Customs Commission on collections of customs duty, excise duty, VAT and surtax on imports [Source 1, page 3,4] [Source 5, page 6]. The report defines a benchmark tax system and compares actual collections with estimated collections under this system to provide annual estimates of tax expenditures [Source 5, page 6]. Understanding, estimating, and reporting on tax expenditures is an important exercise in public financial management [Source 1, page 3,4].
